盗墓的神眼峰曾给我起了个外号，叫鬼手刘。
银狐王显生想要收我当干儿子，他说我做的妙音鸟比他从坑里刨出来的还牛逼。
我叫刘川，哈尔滨人，我在里面蹲了十年。
前半生，我靠着做假古董的手艺，可以说是把福给享尽了，却也是把罪给遭完了...
今儿，我把我的那段经历写成故事，扒一扒曾经两千年代那个地下江湖，从盗墓收货，到古董造假出货的那些事儿。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3a9d84e6fd1c47200e766f8b31294539","author":"北派老木","author_id":"","book_id":"7525413945738284057","book_name":"北派：一个古董做旧师的自传","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3760人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":17,"name":"鉴宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=17&name=鉴宝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7525425400621583385","read_count":"3760","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"982373"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"452","tags":"都市日常,都市,鉴宝,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/57a159ee40a126650faeea852fee0e41~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394644&x-signature=YkYL82TNrclQHH%2BVhWVge8Uz4S0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230417249A3BDEE9776D78B8890B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2736,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6471,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5831},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id"
